home.title: Portfolio
home.intro: Hello, I'm a developer. This site will be completed soon.

presentation.name: CORNU Thomas
presentation.bio:
Full-stack developer with 3 years of experience in Angular and Java Spring Boot, working on the backend (REST APIs, databases, security) and the frontend (dynamic interfaces). 

 Curious, rigorous, and independent, I get involved in demanding projects by focusing on code quality (unit tests, CI with GitLab), performance, and user experience.

projects.title: Projects
projects.intro: A few representative builds: architecture, back-end, front-end, and tooling. Detailed case studies will come in a later version.

dynatrust.title: Dynatrust
dynatrust.description: GRC software developed during my internship at DYNATRUST, the goal was to develop the SaaS solution aiming to establish a management compliant with international standards and norms in cybersecurity.
dynatrust.tags: Java, Spring Boot, PostgreSQL, Docker, Kubernetes, Python, GitLab CI/CD

musculia.title: Musculia
musculia.description: Web application for personalized muscle training generation using AI, adapted to each user.
musculia.tags: Java, Spring Boot, MySQL, Python, AI, Docker

ytechUnion.title: YtechUnion
ytechUnion.description: Web agency creating portfolio sites for student and professional projects. Development of sites from the mockup to hosting.
ytechUnion.tags: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Figma

craft2give.title: Craft2Give
craft2give.description: Ingestion, transformation, and load jobs into a warehouse with scheduling and monitoring.

about.title: About me
about.intro: Development is a big part of my path, but it’s not the whole story. Here’s what keeps me balanced day to day: energy, curiosity, and the need to keep moving.

music.title: Music & festivals
music.body: I love discovering artists, going to gigs, and soaking up festival crowds. Sharing a live moment with people around you is still one of the simplest, strongest feelings I know.

running.title: Running
running.body: Running is my reset: get outside, sync pace with breathing, push the bar a little each time. A solid way to step away from the screen and clear my head.

gaming.title: Gaming
gaming.body: From story-driven solo games to sessions with friends, gaming is space for exploration, strategy, and sometimes friendly competition — another world where you improve, fail, and try again.

travel.title: Travel
travel.body: Travel widens the frame: new landscapes, new habits, and often better conversations. I like sketching an itinerary while leaving room for the unexpected.

nba.title: NBA
nba.body: I follow the NBA for the show, the standard of play, and team arcs that unfold over a season. Game nights are a steady rhythm to unwind and follow the story from tip-off to the final buzzer.

cooking.title: Cooking
cooking.body: I love cooking, discovering new recipes, and sharing meals with friends. Cooking is a way to relax and feel good.

tech.title: Technologies
tech.intro: Tools and environments I work with, grouped by area.

other.title: Automation & cross-cutting
other.description: RPA, security, and skills that span several layers.
